title: Neighborhood gym
note: A small, familiar space for testing physical limits with basic equipment. Focus: simple compound lifts and presence, not performance.

title: River crossing
location: Outdoor river or cold water spot
note: Entering cold moving water, noticing breath, fear, and the urge to retreat. Focus: staying with sensation rather than fighting it.

title: Light sparring circle
note: Slow, controlled sparring with clear rules and consent. Focus: reading another body, responding instead of flinching or overpowering.
